title: [PATCH] Removed the need of a tusp build at runtime
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: No Build, No Problem
gist.blurb: We've removed a broken dev-dependency from our MCP package and streamlined the shipping process. Now it ships directly as an ES module without needing a runtime build!
gist.summary: Removed a broken dev-dependency and updated the MCP package to ship directly as an ES module without a runtime build step.
gist.impact: Developers using the MCP package will experience a cleaner, build-free installation process.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about removing a broken dependency/build step and shipping a clean package. The Nomnom creature eating a broken gear or old code, while Polly the bee holds a clean, glowing green package representing the streamlined npm module.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a broken mechanical gear while Polly the bee mascot hovers nearby holding a glowing lime green (#ecf874) delivery box. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
